content:
#feature

# card will be md format

we change the format of the card. it will be md. the content and everything will be simple.


metadata will be at the top

very top of the file we will separate a section using three minus sign "---"

between these we are going to use yaml format metadata definition.

example:

---
id: 20260327-28fe
creation date: 24.05.2023 - 07:51
calendar week: "21"

---
